pdg_node.statement: (shared_mem_size: int, block_dim_x: int, total_channels: int) -> int
pdg_node.informal_desc: Calculates the number of frequency channels to process in a single tile, based on the simulated shared memory size and the width of the time block.

pdg_node.statement: (input_data: numpy.ndarray, delay_row: numpy.ndarray, time_downsample: int, total_downsampled_time: int, total_channels: int, tile_start_channel: int, tile_channel_height: int, tile_start_time: int, tile_time_width: int) -> numpy.ndarray
pdg_node.informal_desc: For a specific dispersion measure, time block, and channel chunk, this atom loads a tile of data from the input, applying the appropriate time delays for each frequency channel.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Reduces a tile of time-shifted data by summing across the frequency channel axis, producing a partial sum for each time step within the block.
